channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 4 ChatGPT ‘Custom Instructions’ that’ll cut your busywork in half
item.description: If you’re still copy-pasting the same formatting requests or resorting to “write this like a professional” prompts every single time you open ChatGPT, you’re working too hard. There’s an essential feature buried in the Settings menu called Custom Instructions.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: 5 big ideas shaping journalism’s next chapter
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: DIY identity protection vs paid services: What works in 2026
item.description: The Conduent breach, called the largest in U.S. history by Texas AG Ken Paxton, exposed millions of records. Here's how to protect your identity now.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Traditional forecasting still beats AI for the most extreme weather
item.description: AI is being touted as the future of weather forecasting—faster and more precise. But new research shows a major blind spot: it often fails at predicting extreme weather. Traditional physics-based models still do better.
item.dc:creator: Adele Peters, Fast Company

item.title: 7 ways AI is being used at work by everyone from teachers to marketing professionals
item.description: Artificial intelligence is permeating workplaces, changing the nature of jobs of every stripe. Teachers are using it to create lesson plans and grade papers. Marketing professionals are harnessing it to work a room and learn about the needs of potential clients.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Apple just had the best March quarter ever, says outgoing CEO Tim Cook
item.description: Apple posted strong results for its quarterly earnings on Thursday, but investors’ attention is also focused on the upcoming CEO change and the tech firm’s artificial intelligence strategy.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: ADT data breach exposes customer information
item.description: ADT confirms a new data breach exposing customer names, phone numbers and addresses. The cybercrime group ShinyHunters claims it stole millions of records.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Apple breaks records, admits it can’t make Macs fast enough
item.description: Outgoing Apple CEO Tim Cook’s swan song sings of success as the company on Thursday announced record revenue in its second quarter, while admitting demand for some products — including the new MacBook Neo — has wildly exceeded expectations.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Mexico City is sinking so quickly, it can be seen from space
item.description: Mexico City is sinking nearly 10 inches every year, making it one of the world’s fastest-sinking metropolitan areas.
item.dc:creator: Megan Janetsky, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fake SSA email alert: Spot this scam fast
item.description: A dangerous phishing email disguised as a Social Security Administration notice tricks users into downloading malware. Here is how to spot the scam.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
